Interface SkillDao

public interface SkillDao
JDBI DAO for the player_skills table.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    SkillDao.SkillRow
    Internal data transfer object for JDBI mapping.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<SkillDao.SkillRow>
    findAll(String uuid)
    Loads all skill XP rows for a player.
    Long
    findOne(String uuid, String skillId)
    Loads the XP for a single skill, or null if no row exists yet.
    void
    upsertXP(String uuid, String skillId, long xp)
    Inserts or updates a player's XP for a skill, keeping whichever value is higher.

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      List<SkillDao.SkillRow> findAll(String uuid)
      Loads all skill XP rows for a player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID string
      Returns:
      all skill rows for this player

    • findOne

      Long findOne(String uuid, String skillId)
      Loads the XP for a single skill, or null if no row exists yet.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID string
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      the stored XP, or null if not found

    • upsertXP

      void upsertXP(String uuid, String skillId, long xp)
      Inserts or updates a player's XP for a skill, keeping whichever value is higher. Using GREATEST guards against out-of-order async writes overwriting a newer value.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID string
      skillId - the skill identifier
      xp - the new total XP value
